---
title: "P8106 Data Science II – Midterm Project"
author: "Zichen Fan, Yiming Cao"
date: "2026-03-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo      = TRUE,
  message   = FALSE,
  warning   = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 5
)
```

```{r packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)        
library(earth)         # MARS
library(gbm)           # Gradient Boosting
library(randomForest)  # Random Forest 
library(corrplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

---

# Part I — Building a Prediction Model for Researcher A (1990–1995 Cohort)

## Data Loading and Preprocessing

```{r load-data}
load("data/datA.RData")
load("data/datB.RData")

dat_a <- datA
dat_b <- datB
```

Numerically coded categorical variables are converted to factors.
The patient ID column is excluded from modeling.

```{r factor-coding}
factor_vars <- c("menopause", "race", "tumor_grade",
                 "ER", "PR", "HER2", "stage",
                 "surgery", "chemo", "hormonal_therapy")

recode_factors <- function(df) {
  df |> mutate(across(all_of(factor_vars), as.factor))
}

dat_a <- recode_factors(dat_a)
dat_b <- recode_factors(dat_b)

# Predictor matrices and outcome vectors
x_a <- dat_a |> select(-id, -log_PFS)
y_a <- dat_a$log_PFS
x_b <- dat_b |> select(-id, -log_PFS)
y_b <- dat_b$log_PFS

cat("datA: n =", nrow(dat_a), " | predictors =", ncol(x_a), "\n")
cat("datB: n =", nrow(dat_b), " | predictors =", ncol(x_b), "\n")
```

## Missing Data

```{r missing-data}
missing_tbl <- dat_a |>
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.)))) |>
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "n_missing") |>
  filter(n_missing > 0)

if (nrow(missing_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("No missing values detected in datA.\n")
} else {
  kable(missing_tbl, caption = "Missing values in datA") |>
    kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
}
```

## Exploratory Data Analysis

### Outcome: log(PFS)

```{r eda-outcome, fig.cap="Distribution and normality check of log(PFS) in datA"}
p_hist <- ggplot(dat_a, aes(x = log_PFS)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, fill = "steelblue", color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  labs(title = "Histogram of log(PFS)",
       x = "log(PFS) in months", y = "Count") +
  theme_bw()

p_qq <- ggplot(dat_a, aes(sample = log_PFS)) +
  stat_qq(color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_qq_line(color = "firebrick") +
  labs(title = "Normal Q-Q Plot") +
  theme_bw()

ggarrange(p_hist, p_qq, ncol = 2)|>ggsave(filename ="figures/eda_1_outcome_dist.png", width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
ggarrange(p_hist, p_qq, ncol = 2)
```

### Continuous Predictors

```{r eda-continuous, fig.height=7, fig.cap="Continuous predictors vs. log(PFS) with loess smoother"}
cont_vars <- c("age", "bmi", "tumor_size", "lymph_nodes", "Ki67")

dat_a |>
  select(all_of(cont_vars), log_PFS) |>
  pivot_longer(-log_PFS, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = value, y = log_PFS)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 0.7, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE,
              color = "firebrick", linewidth = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title = "Continuous Predictors vs. log(PFS)",
       x = "Predictor value", y = "log(PFS)") +
  theme_bw()

ggsave("figures/eda_continuous_loess.png", width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

### Categorical Predictors

```{r eda-categorical, fig.height=9, fig.cap="log(PFS) distribution by categorical predictors"}
cat_vars <- c("menopause", "race", "tumor_grade",
              "ER", "PR", "HER2", "stage",
              "surgery", "chemo", "hormonal_therapy")

dat_a |>
  select(all_of(cat_vars), log_PFS) |>
  pivot_longer(-log_PFS, names_to = "variable", values_to = "level") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = level, y = log_PFS, fill = level)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7, outlier.size = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_x", ncol = 4) +
  labs(title = "log(PFS) by Categorical Predictors",
       x = NULL, y = "log(PFS)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, size = 7))
ggsave("figures/eda_categorical_boxplot.png", width = 12, height = 9, dpi = 300)
```

### Correlation Among Continuous Predictors

```{r eda-correlation, fig.height=5, fig.cap="Pearson correlation matrix for continuous predictors"}

png("figures/eda_correlation_matrix.png", width = 1000, height = 1000, res = 150)

dat_a |>
  select(all_of(cont_vars), log_PFS) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  corrplot(method = "color", type = "upper", tl.cex = 0.85,
           addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.7,
           mar = c(0, 0, 1.5, 0),
           title = "Pearson Correlation – Continuous Variables & Outcome")
dev.off()

dat_a |>
  select(all_of(cont_vars), log_PFS) |>
  cor(use = "complete.obs") |>
  corrplot(method = "color", type = "upper", tl.cex = 0.85,
           addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.7,
           mar = c(0, 0, 1.5, 0),
           title = "Pearson Correlation – Continuous Variables & Outcome")
```
